calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-16-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Continued To May-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Continued To Apr-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire,, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Steven C. Williams, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 19th & Valencia Associates.
Arthur C. Lipton, Esq. appeared with defendants Luzuiminda Blanco, Don McPherson, Mery Beltran, a/k/a Merlie Beltran, Cerbesia Lara and Joanne Rivera.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 13, 2008.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Williams.

Pursuant to the terms of the agreement, defendants, shall vacate the premises located at 3423 19th Street, San Francisco, CA 94110, no later than May 15, 2008.
Plaintiff shall waive all past due rent owed by defendants. Plaintiff shall return defendants security deposit. If defendants comply with the terms of the settlement agreement, plaintiff shall dismiss this action without prejudice.
If defendants fail to comply with the terms of the settlement agreement set forth above, plaintiff 19th & Valencia Associates shall, upon ex parte application, obtain judgment from defendants Luzuiminda Blanco, Don McPherson, Mery Beltran, a/k/a Merlie Beltran, Cerbesia Lara and Joanne Rivera. There shall be no mutual release or waiver of rights by the parties.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS JOANNA RIVERA, MERLIE BERTRAM, EDWALDO ENRIQUEZ, DONALD MACPHERSON, SIMPLICIA LARA, NESTOR DELA CRUZ, LUZUIMINDA BLANCO, CARMELINO SOLON, MA. JUANITA DELA CRUZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
